commonWorkflows: Document processing pipelines (invoices, contracts, medical records) using LLM APIs + Make/n8n
Multi agent systems where specialized agents handle different parts of a business process
CRM integrations connecting AI analysis to Salesforce, HubSpot, or Airtable
Customer service automation with voice AI or chatbots connected to knowledge bases
Data extraction and classification workflows triggered by email, webhook, or scheduled
Client reporting dashboards that pull from multiple AI processed data sources
Compliance monitoring systems that flag regulatory changes for specific industries
insightRules: When writing useCase, action, or clientPitch: reference a specific workflow pattern from commonWorkflows above. Name a real tool. Describe a concrete first step. Never say 'could be useful' or 'worth exploring.' Instead say 'test this on your invoice pipeline' or 'swap the GPT call in your document classifier for this.' The reader builds systems. Insights must be about systems, not general awareness.
